objective: Register the package/genesis/constitution contract families, compile immutable package content into a proposed genesis root without live state, and admit genesis through the owning authority, daemon, and Agentgres boundaries.
falsifiable_claim: Malformed, mismatched, stale, or ordinary-authority genesis attempts admit nothing; one package admits distinct Systems without shared live state at the compiler level.
adversarial_or_fault_proof: M1.3 retains its compiler, authority, immutable-evidence, corruption, crash, concurrency, and Agentgres regression bar (cargo tests in system_genesis.rs plus route conformance).
remaining_nonclaims: No multi-node continuity, public consensus, IOI Network assurance, or general correctness claim.
The package remains reusable and contains no live lease, credential, gateway, run, node, or System identity.
source_provenance: Migrated 2026-07-22 from the implementation-matrix AutonomousSystem envelope row (status text retired from the cell).
